negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_029
prompt: The video opens with a wide shot of a spacious warehouse, characterized by high ceilings and industrial lighting that illuminates the area evenly. The floor is concrete, marked with a yellow safety line, and scattered with various items such as cylindrical drums in the left side of the foreground, pallets stacked with boxes, and shelving units holding an assortment of goods. On the left side, there are workstations with equipment and materials, while the right side features shelves stocked with products, including spools of wire or cable. A "TOYOTA" forklift is prominently positioned near the center, actively engaged in moving a pallet of boxes. The forks are raised, indicating the forklift has lifted the boxes. The scene remains consistent throughout the video, and a person wearing a black cap is driving the forklift backwards, maintaining a steady acceleration and depicting an operational warehouse environment.
